title: Submit Report
prompt: 5 step-based layout (clean sections): 1. Dept selection (Cybercrime, Income Tax, Municipal, Social Welfare) 2. Sub-issues (show top 10 dynamically, include Other with max 15 char input) 3. Upload proof (drag drop preview) 4. Description (textarea) 5. Location (capture area only). Submit button shows generated ID (e.g. A-1234).

title: Community Validation
prompt: Top search bar (location/ID). Auto-detect location icon. Show complaints in 2-3km radius as cards (title, area, dept, status). On click: detail view with proof, agree/disagree poll, vote counts. Highlight Most reported department in your area.

title: Track Complaints
prompt: Search bar for complaint ID. Result display: ID, issue title, area, status badge (Submitted-gray, In Progress-blue, Resolved-green, Disapproved-red).

title: Admin Login
prompt: Admin Login page with Department selection dropdown, username input, password input.

title: Admin Dashboard
prompt: Stats cards (total, pending, in progress, resolved). Reports table (ID, title, area, status, More button). Detail view with full description/proof. Analytics chart showing issues by locality.
